categories.name: Contract Coverage
categories.rationale_md: 33 out of 36 contract fields have zero test coverage. The 3 partial fields (amount, currency, wallet_id) assert only status codes.

categories.name: Test Grouping
categories.rationale_md: Request spec groups by param name but groups are shallow; multiple endpoints combined in one file; service spec duplicates concerns as a non-boundary file.

categories.name: Scenario Depth
categories.rationale_md: Meaningful depth exists only for amount (2 of 17 needed) and currency (2 of 15 needed). Zero scenarios for every response field, every DB postcondition, every outbound call.

categories.name: Test Case Quality
categories.rationale_md: Every test asserts only `have_http_status`. No body parsing, no DB assertions, no outbound API assertions.

categories.name: Isolation & Flakiness
categories.rationale_md: Request spec uses a real DB (correct). PaymentGateway is never mocked in the request spec — any network call would be uncontrolled.

categories.name: Anti-Patterns
categories.rationale_md: Seven anti-patterns identified — service spec testing private method dispatch, multiple endpoints in one file, implementation testing, missing shared helper, error tests assert status only, happy path asserts status only.

top_priority_actions.action: Fix the double-charge via after_create callback (Transaction#notify_payment_gateway). Move gateway trigger into a single explicit service method and add a contract test that PaymentGateway.charge is invoked exactly once per payment-category transaction.
Add the FINTECH balance-leak test for InsufficientBalanceError — assert error details array does NOT include wallet.balance value.
Introduce shared `subject(:run_test)` + `defaults` foundation in request spec and upgrade existing error tests to assert (no DB write, no outbound call, no data leak).
Add happy-path response-body assertions for every response field (id/amount/currency/status/description/category/wallet_id/created_at/updated_at).
Add TOCTOU / concurrent-withdraw test — two concurrent requests each below balance but summing above — must never drive balance negative.
